description:
A robotics engineer is designing a custom gearbox input shaft for a 6-axis robotic arm. Create a stepped shaft as a single Part Design body with three coaxial cylindrical sections centered on the Z-axis:
- Section 1: Diameter 8 mm, Height 15 mm (Z = 0 to 15)
- Section 2: Diameter 12 mm, Height 25 mm (Z = 15 to 40)
- Section 3: Diameter 10 mm, Height 20 mm (Z = 40 to 60)
The final model must be a single solid body with a total length of 60 mm and a maximum diameter of 12 mm. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/stepped_shaft.FCStd.
